response.justification: Bogdan has over 15 years of strong software engineering experience and a valuable entrepreneurial background as a founder, which meets several baseline requirements. However, for a Director-level Principal Engineer focused specifically on AI Strategy, he lacks the necessary depth in artificial intelligence, recognized AI industry expertise, and strategic enterprise-level AI advisory experience required to succeed in this specialized role.
strengths: Over 15 years of hands-on software, hardware, and infrastructure engineering experience.
Valuable entrepreneurial experience as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Strong background in cloud technologies, developer tooling, and active open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the recognized expertise and long-term track record in AI/ML required for this specialized role.
AI-specific experience is limited to a very recent position, lacking deep AI strategy background.
Experience is primarily at the Senior/Staff level, which may not translate to a Director-level strategic advisory role.
